name: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Texaco Dahlonega (Dahlonega)
description_short: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM located at Texaco Dahlonega allows customers to buy and sell cryptocurrencies with cash at a physical kiosk in Dahlonega, Georgia.
description_long:
CoinFlip operates a network of cryptocurrency ATMs across the United States, with this particular location situated at Texaco Dahlonega on 550 South Chestatee Street. The company specializes in providing direct cash-to-crypto transactions without requiring traditional banking intermediaries. CoinFlip's ATM model enables customers to convert fiat currency into various cryptocurrencies quickly and conveniently at a physical location.

The Dahlonega location offers cryptocurrency purchases with cash and supports multiple digital assets beyond Bitcoin. The ATM operates with extended hours (7:00 AM to 10:00 PM daily) to accommodate customer schedules. CoinFlip provides 24/7 customer support via phone and email, and customers can download the CoinFlip Crypto Wallet app to prepare for transactions before visiting the machine. The company also offers a CoinFlip Account feature that allows customers to save transaction preferences and access up to $15,000 per day in transaction limits (with limits varying by location).

CoinFlip differentiates itself through its widespread ATM network availability, user-friendly digital wallet integration, and account management system. The company provides detailed educational content about cryptocurrency, including blog posts explaining blockchain technology and cryptocurrency basics. The ATM location benefits from being housed within an established Texaco gas station, providing a familiar and accessible physical location for transactions.

Limitations include the lack of specific fee information displayed on the website, undisclosed transaction limits specific to the Dahlonega location, and the requirement for customers to obtain a cryptocurrency wallet before transacting. The service is limited to cryptocurrency purchases and sales rather than broader financial services, and transaction speeds are not explicitly guaranteed beyond general mentions of "quick" processing.
pros: Extended daily hours (7:00 AM - 10:00 PM) provide convenient access seven days a week
24/7 customer support available via phone (1-877-757-2646) and email for transaction assistance
CoinFlip Account feature allows users to save preferences and access increased daily limits up to $15,000
Multiple cryptocurrencies available for purchase beyond Bitcoin, including Solana and others
CoinFlip Crypto Wallet integration allows customers to set up wallets in advance of visiting the ATM
Physical location at established Texaco gas station provides familiar, accessible venue
Educational blog content helps beginners understand cryptocurrency basics before transacting
cons: No specific fee structure or pricing details disclosed on the website
Transaction limits vary by location, with actual Dahlonega limit not specified
Requires customers to download separate wallet app prior to transacting, adding setup steps
No information on transaction processing time or when crypto arrives in customer wallet
Limited to buy/sell transactions only; does not offer broader financial services
best_for: Cryptocurrency enthusiasts seeking convenient cash-to-crypto conversions without bank accounts
Customers in the Dahlonega area needing quick access to Bitcoin and alternative cryptocurrencies
First-time crypto buyers who want in-person, physical ATM transactions rather than online exchanges
Regular cryptocurrency investors needing accessible local kiosks with extended operating hours
diagnosis: This Bitcoin ATM is best for cryptocurrency buyers in the Dahlonega area who prefer cash transactions and want convenient access to digital assets without traditional banking intermediaries. The main caveat is that users must set up an external wallet before transacting, and exact fee structures and location-specific limits are not transparent on the website, requiring direct contact with customer support for complete pricing information.
services: Alternative cryptocurrency purchases (Solana, other digital assets)
CoinFlip Crypto Wallet download and setup
CoinFlip Account creation for transaction history and limits management
24/7 customer support via phone and email
Educational content on cryptocurrency and blockchain technology
Multi-cryptocurrency support at single ATM location
